name: SmartEarn

rewards.displayRate: 10 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent on select 10X merchants
5 Membership Rewards Points / Rs 50 spent on Amazon
1 Membership Rewards Point / Rs 50 spent on other eligible spends

exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Rs 500 cashback as welcome gift on eligible spends of Rs 10,000 in the first 90 days of Cardmembership

joiningBenefits: Rs 500 cashback as welcome gift on eligible spends of Rs 10,000 in the first 90 days of Cardmembership

milestones.label: Vouchers worth Rs 500 each on reaching spends of Rs 1.20 lakh, Rs 1.80 lakh, and Rs 2.40 lakh in a cardmembership year

milestoneBenefits: Vouchers worth Rs 500 each on reaching spends of Rs 1.20 lakh, Rs 1.80 lakh, and Rs 2.40 lakh in a cardmembership year

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point -> 1 Marriott Bonvoy point

salaried: Employed with personal annual income of Rs 4.5 lakh and above
Good credit history with no payment defaults
Resident Indian with current or permanent residential address in India
selfEmployed: Self-employed with personal annual income of Rs 6 lakh and above
Company has been trading for more than 12 months
Resident Indian with current or permanent residential address in India

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08

10X rewards are capped at 500 Membership Rewards points per month jointly for Flipkart, Uber, BookMyShow and other listed 10X merchants, and separately capped at 500 Membership Rewards points per month jointly for EaseMyTrip and Zomato.
5X rewards on Amazon are capped at 250 Membership Rewards points per month.
Welcome cashback is credited as statement credit within 10 working days after completion of eligible spends.
